title: Museum prep with a hidden decor choice
task: Prepare the home for a quick museum-style walkthrough: place the correct living-room display item on the bedroom_3 table, put the kitchen cup on the dining-room table, and leave the fridge open at the end.

agent_0: agent_0 can send at most 1 message.
The correct living-room display item for the shared task is cushion_3 on stand_30 in living_room_1.
The relevant living-room display surfaces are stand_30, table_18, and table_19.
The shared destination for the correct display item is table_52 in bedroom_3.
One hidden personal objective is that bowl_2 should end on stool_23 in kitchen_1.
agent_1: agent_1 can send at most 1 message.
The kitchen cup for the shared task is cup_0 on counter_21 in kitchen_1.
Its shared destination is table_14 in dining_room_1.
The shared destination for the correct living-room display item is table_52 in bedroom_3.
The fridge for the shared task is fridge_49 in kitchen_1.
One hidden personal objective is that spoon_1 should end on stool_24 in kitchen_1.
agent_2: agent_2 can send at most 1 message.
The relevant living-room display surfaces are stand_30, table_18, and table_19.
The shared destination for the correct living-room display item is table_52 in bedroom_3.
The kitchen cup for the shared task is cup_0 on counter_21 in kitchen_1 and its destination is table_14 in dining_room_1.
The fridge for the shared task is fridge_49 in kitchen_1.
One hidden personal objective is that bowl_2 should end on stool_25 in kitchen_1.

problem_pddl:
(define (problem scene_108736824_177263559_mixed_k1_hidden_decor_choice)
  (:domain emtom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 agent_2 - agent
    bedroom_1 hallway_1 kitchen_1 living_room_1 bedroom_3 dining_room_1 - room
    cup_0 spoon_1 bowl_2 cushion_3 - object
    counter_21 stool_23 stool_24 stool_25 fridge_49 stand_30 table_52 table_14 - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 bedroom_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 hallway_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_2 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room counter_21 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room stool_23 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room stool_24 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room stool_25 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room fridge_49 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room stand_30 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room table_52 bedroom_3)
    (is_in_room table_14 dining_room_1)
    (is_in_room cup_0 kitchen_1)
    (is_on_top cup_0 counter_21)
    (is_in_room spoon_1 kitchen_1)
    (is_on_top spoon_1 counter_21)
    (is_in_room bowl_2 kitchen_1)
    (is_on_top bowl_2 counter_21)
    (is_in_room cushion_3 living_room_1)
    (is_on_top cushion_3 stand_30)
  )
  (:goal (and
    (is_on_top cushion_3 table_52)
    (is_on_top cup_0 table_14)
    (is_open fridge_49)
    (K agent_0 (is_open fridge_49))
  ))
  (:goal-owners
    (agent_0 (is_on_top bowl_2 stool_23))
    (agent_1 (is_on_top spoon_1 stool_24))
    (agent_2 (is_on_top bowl_2 stool_25))
  )
)
